title: Listening ETS 2026 — Test 4
desc: Listening Test 4, câu 1–100 — file đề gốc dạng snapshot + audio. Đáp án theo key gốc cuối sách. Lưu ý: audio dùng file tải về tên "Zalo Test 2.mp3" vì file này khớp nội dung PDF Test 4, không khớp PDF Test 2.

parts.directions: Nghe 4 câu mô tả về mỗi bức ảnh và chọn câu mô tả đúng nhất. Câu hỏi và đáp án chỉ có trong audio.

items.transcript:
Questions thirty five through thirty seven refer to the following conversation
Chen I hope all is going well on your first day
I saw you have some scheduled seafood deliveries across the bay in the Morgan district
Why haven't you left yet? I wasn't going to head over to that particular area for another hour
Do the restaurants in the Morgan district want their deliveries earlier than scheduled? No, but I'm concerned about Bay Bridge traffic
It's routinely congested with vehicles so you should always add at least an extra hour to your trip out there
Thanks for the tip. I'll also check traffic webcams on the highway agency's website
Number thirty five. What most likely is the man's job?
number thirty six. Why is the woman concerned?
Number thirty seven. What does the man say he will check?

questions.question: Why does the man recommend reading an email?

items.transcript:
Questions thirty eight through forty refer to the following conversation
This morning I got an email from pelicon a local producer of beauty products
They're interested in purchasing lanolin from us to use in their new line of all natural makeup
I'm not sure about that. We're a fairly small farm and we already sell lanolin to another local business
I'm worried that we don't produce enough lanolin to meet the demand of another client
I don't want to expand and take on more wool production
But our contract with the business we currently supply lanolin to has almost expired. There's no guarantee it will be renewed
I think you should at least read pelicon's proposal. Sure. Can you forward me the email?
number thirty eight according to the man. What does pelicon produce?
number thirty nine. What does the woman say she is concerned about?
number forty. Why does the man recommend reading an email?

items.transcript:
Questions forty one through forty three refer to the following conversation
Ms. Rean, this is Lewis. I heard you're going to be working for our company overseas in the New Zealand office. What a great opportunity
Yes, thank you. I start next month and I'm really excited
I'm calling to touch base with you about some of our vendor contracts
It's time to renew the contracts and I wanted to ask you to take care of that before you left
No problem. I know where those files are located on our shared computer drive. I'll just need the password to access them
number forty one. What will the woman do next month?
number forty two. What does the man want the woman to do?
number forty three. What does the woman ask the man for?

items.transcript:
Questions forty seven through forty nine refer to the following conversation with three speakers. Hello, Uscha. Hi, Pablo.
Hey, Constantine. We're talking about our thoughts on the new company policy for remote workers.
On the days I have to come into the office, I always worry about finding an appropriate workstation.
Yeah, I don't like the unpredictability either. Why can't we just sign up for our workstation sometime in advance?
What do you think about it? These are good points. Let's all go to the director to discuss this with her.
I believe she's in her office. So now's a good time. Oh, I can't go now. I have a report to finalize by noon.
number forty seven. What are the speakers discussing?
number forty eight. What do the men want to do?
number forty nine. What does the woman say she needs to do now?

items.transcript:
Questions fifty through fifty two refer to the following conversation.
Okay, Mr. Jabreen. Here's your new library card. Remember that you can borrow books, CDs and DVDs from our collection with it.
Thank you. I read somewhere that people can also borrow digital items?
Yes. We offer the Cloud Camel application. All you have to do is download the app and use the information on your card to set up an account.
That's great. I go on a business trip every month, so having easy access to online content will be convenient.
number fifty. Who most likely is the woman?
number fifty one. What does the woman recommend that the man do?
number fifty two. What does the man say happens each month?

items.transcript:
Questions fifty three through fifty five refer to the following conversation.
Have you reviewed the data from the workplace survey? You really should.
It looks like most staff feel positive about the direction that the company is going in, but almost forty percent feel like their individual contributions aren't being recognized.
Well, the company's certainly had other priorities. I wonder how the management team's going to respond.
I've suggested many times that they give out awards every quarter for exceptional performance. Maybe now they'll finally start doing it.
number fifty three. What does the woman want the man to look at?
number fifty four. What does the man imply when he says, "The company's certainly had other priorities?"
number fifty five. What has the woman suggested in the past?

questions.explanation: Đáp án theo answer key gốc của Listening ETS 2026 Test 4. Đọc lựa chọn trong ảnh đề và đối chiếu với transcript/audio.

items.transcript:
Questions fifty six through fifty eight refer to the following conversation with three speakers.
Hi, Agiola. As I mentioned on the phone, my colleague and I recently started a clothing company and are hoping your branding firm can help us promote our line of athletic apparel.
You think we should focus on advertising on social media, right?
Right. Contrary to popular belief, television is definitely not the entire advertising landscape.
Advertising on the internet is also a great way for a company to increase its visibility.
I heard you recommended working with an online influencer.
Yes, Saskia Hoffman. Saskia is very knowledgeable about exercise, and lots of people use her online exercise routines.
Her viewers will pay attention to what she recommends and wears.
number fifty six. What type of business do the women own?
number fifty seven. What does the man say regarding television?
number fifty eight. According to the man, why would Saskia Hoffman be a good choice?

items.transcript:
Questions fifty nine through sixty one refer to the following conversation.
Hi, Shinji. I wanted to ask you about the order we got from the department store chain.
You know, the one that placed an order for five thousand jigsaw puzzles?
Yes. They want the order in a week so they can stock them before the holiday.
A week is not a long time.
We've had short timelines before. Anyway, our illustrators sent some new puzzle illustrations, right?
I heard they're making a special edition.
Yes, and I'm so excited. I've got the sketches right here. Let me show you.
number fifty nine. What does the speaker's company manufacture?
number sixty. What does the woman imply when she says,
"A week is not a long time"?
number sixty one. What will the woman do next?

items.transcript:
questions sixty two through sixty four refer to the following conversation and billing statement.
Hi, Ms. Rottie. I understand you're concerned about a charge that appears on the statement for your business account.
Yes. I have a question about the charge on May 3rd. I don't remember purchasing anything for that amount.
Let me review your statement now. Hmm. It looks like that purchase was made abroad,
so an international transaction fee was added to the purchase amount.
Oh, yes. I was out of the country at that time. Thanks for clarifying.
Can you provide me with a list of all the bank fees for transactions made abroad?
Yes, of course. Here's a document that lists all the information.
number sixty two. Where does the man most likely work?
number sixty three. Look at the graphic. Which amount does the woman ask about?
number sixty four. What does the man give the woman?

questions.explanation: Đáp án theo answer key gốc của Listening ETS 2026 Test 4. Đọc lựa chọn trong ảnh đề và đối chiếu với transcript/audio.

items.transcript:
questions sixty five through sixty seven refer to the following conversation and map.
Magali, were you able to reserve the Performing Arts Center for the piano concert?
Yes. I booked their main auditorium for that day. They're sending me the contract.
Thanks for doing that. No problem. Hopefully it'll be as successful as last year.
We sold two thousand tickets last year, but we had three celebrity performers. I'm worried we won't sell as many tickets this year.
Well, Xinyu Gu is a very popular pianist, and she's staying after the concert to sign autographs.
Which reminds me, where should we set up the table for that?
Good question. Hmm. The cafe should be closed by then. Let's set it up next to the cafe.
number sixty five. What does the man thank the woman for doing?
number sixty six. What does the man say he is worried about?
number sixty seven. Look at the graphic. Where will a table be set up?

items.transcript:
questions sixty eight through seventy refer to the following conversation and blog post list.
Welcome to the garden center. Can I help you?
Hi. I've started growing rose bushes, and I've heard they require special care. Are there any products you can recommend?
Yes, but first, I'd like to show you a great resource on our website. Have you seen our blog?
No, I haven't. We have monthly posts on many gardening topics, and there's a recent one about growing roses.
I'll check it out. Thanks so much. You're welcome. Now, let me show you our fertilizers. They're in aisle six.
number sixty eight. Why is the woman at the garden center?
number sixty nine. Look at the graphic. Which month's post will the woman most likely read?

items.transcript:
questions seventy one through seventy three refer to the following announcement.
Attention Cassella Transit customers. Maintenance work on the red and yellow lines will begin next week.
You can expect some disruptions to regular service, so please plan ahead. Use the latest version of our mobile phone application for real-time updates.
You can receive notifications regarding delays if your train is impacted. Want to save on commuter rides?
Purchase your e-ticket through the mobile app as well. Printing a ticket at a kiosk is now subject to additional fees.
number seventy one. What field does the speaker most likely work in?
number seventy two. What does the speaker say the listeners can receive notifications about?
number seventy three. According to the speaker, how can the listeners reduce a cost?

items.transcript:
questions seventy four through seventy six refer to the following excerpt from a meeting.
Good morning, Glenman House Living Museum staff. Recently, researchers discovered the original plans for the house's gardens from the 18th century. So we're going to restore the gardens based on those plans.
Even though we have the original designs, making an authentic recreation won't be an easy task. We don't know what specific varieties of plants were grown back then.
That's why we're so lucky to have Vivek Hazarika consulting on this project. As a gardener who has managed the grounds of many historic estates, he has extensive expertise in what would have been planted at the time.
number seventy four. What is the purpose of the meeting?
number seventy five. According to the speaker, why will a task be challenging?
number seventy six. Who is Vivek Hazarika?

items.transcript:
question seventy seven through seventy nine refer to the following instructions. Welcome new sales representatives to today's session on cold calling, a sales technique where we call potential clients who haven't heard of us yet.
Toward the end of the session, you'll each be given a list of prospective parties to call. Now, the people you're contacting are busy and may not be receptive. Your job is to persuade them that what you have to say is worth their while.
Be friendly and avoid using scripts. Now, we'll listen to some cold call recordings to learn what works and what doesn't.
number seventy seven. What is the purpose of the session?
number seventy eight. What will be on a list that the listeners will receive?
number seventy nine. What will the listeners do next?

items.transcript:
questions eighty through eighty two refer to the following telephone message.
Miss Stewart, this is Rodrigo Gomez, president of Gomez and Sons. I want to apologize personally for the problems your restaurant experienced using our patio umbrellas. At our company, we pride ourselves on doing everything in house, from graphic design to production.
This gives us greater control over the quality of our products, but we do use outside suppliers for parts. Apparently, we receive some inferior metal components.
We will send you a replacement set of umbrellas at no cost today, constructed with new metal parts.
number eighty. What does the speaker's company sell?

segs.text: questions eighty through eighty two refer to the following telephone message.

Miss Stewart, this is Rodrigo Gomez, president of Gomez and Sons. I want to apologize personally for the problems your restaurant experienced using our patio umbrellas. At our company, we pride ourselves on doing everything in house, from graphic design to production.
This gives us greater control over the quality of our products, but we do use outside suppliers for parts. Apparently, we receive some inferior metal components.
We will send you a replacement set of umbrellas at no cost today, constructed with new metal parts.
number eighty. What does the speaker's company sell?
number eighty one. Why does the speaker say? We do use outside suppliers for parts.

items.transcript:
Questions eighty six through eighty eight refer to the following excerpt from a meeting. I've just received details about this year's hospitality conference.
It looks like it'll be particularly informative this year. It'll be held at the end of the month. Now, I know I've set your project due dates for the end of the month as well, but this is an important opportunity.
The conference will feature an expo of vendors who serve hotel chains, which could be useful given that we'll be opening hotels in two new cities next year.
Speaking of which, Thilo visited both of those construction sites last week and is now going to give us a progress report.
number eighty six. What does the speaker mean when he says? This is an important opportunity.
number eighty seven. What will the speaker's business do next year?
number eighty eight. What will Thilo do next?

Questions ninety two through ninety four refer to the following excerpt from a meeting.
Okay, team. Let's discuss our first quarter sales figures. Unfortunately, retail sales of our smart watches and other products have continued to fall.
Our president has proposed expanding the product line to include a virtual reality headset, and those have been popular lately.
You can expect a lot more information at a future meeting. Next on the agenda, Raya will be demonstrating the new software we'll be using to track consumer purchasing trends.

items.transcript:
Questions ninety five through ninety seven refer to the following tour information and weather forecast.
Please follow me and we'll begin today's tour. Now, I know not everyone who takes this all access tour is a football fan.
Many of our visitors are just curious about how a modern sports facility of this size operates.
Well, you'll get to see that and much more. And fortunately for us, today's forecast shows a mix of sun and clouds with no rain.
That's just the right combination for spending some time outside on the field comfortably.
Also, as a heads up, a shuttle bus will meet us at the end of the tour to bring us all back to the parking lot.
number ninety five. Where are the listeners?
number ninety six. Look at the graphic. When is the tour taking place?
number ninety seven. What will happen at the end of the tour?

items.transcript:
Questions ninety eight through one hundred refer to the following excerpt from a meeting and assignment list.
As you all know, we're hosting a large event tonight. It's a dinner party to celebrate the retirement of a long time employee of Jelton Incorporated.
The chefs are already prepping dinner and I need you all to set up the ballroom. Here's the assignment list.
There's just one change. Amanda couldn't make it, so Kota's covering for her and will take Amanda's assignment.
Now I have a meeting with a potential client at noon, but otherwise I'll be available all day if anything comes up.
number ninety eight. What type of event is being held tonight?
number ninety nine. Look at the graphic. Which assignment will Kota be responsible for?
number one hundred. What does the speaker say she has to do at noon?
